SettingForm.Label.界面语言描述: Select the display language for the application interface
SettingForm.Label.避免光标冲突: Avoid cursor control conflict with user
SettingForm.Label.避免光标冲突描述: During buying or rerolling, if a mouse click by the user is detected, control will be briefly yielded to the user
SettingForm.Label.模拟操作间隔描述: Wait time after buying or rerolling (ms)
SettingForm.Label.模拟鼠标拿牌描述: Buy champions by simulating mouse movement and clicks
SettingForm.Label.模拟按键拿牌描述: Buy champions by simulating keyboard key presses
SettingForm.Label.自动停止拿牌描述1: Disable auto buy when a target champion fails to be purchased multiple times
SettingForm.Label.模拟鼠标刷新商店描述: Reroll shop by simulating mouse movement and clicks
SettingForm.Label.模拟按键刷新商店描述: Reroll shop by simulating keyboard key presses
SettingForm.Label.刷新失败时自动停止描述1: Disable auto reroll when the shop fails to refresh multiple times consecutively
SettingForm.Label.识别错误时自动停止: Auto stop rerolling on OCR error
SettingForm.Label.识别错误时自动停止描述: Auto stop rerolling when characters not matching any champion name are detected
SettingForm.Label.刷新商店间隔CPU描述: Wait time after rerolling in CPU inference mode (ms)
SettingForm.Label.刷新商店间隔GPU描述: Wait time after rerolling in GPU inference mode (ms)
SettingForm.Label.高亮边框渐变色1描述: Sets the gradient color of the highlight border
SettingForm.Label.高亮边框渐变色2描述: Sets the gradient color of the highlight border
SettingForm.Label.高亮边框粗细描述: Sets the width of the highlight border (pixels)
SettingForm.Label.渐变流动速度描述: Sets the flow speed of the highlight border gradient
SettingForm.Label.自动设置坐标提示: Auto coordinates only works with PC TFT (any resolution) and MuMu emulator (resolution 1600x910, DPI: 227)
SettingForm.Label.目标显示器描述: Set the display where the game window is located
SettingForm.Label.弈子截图坐标与大小描述: Set the screenshot parameters for OCR champion recognition
SettingForm.Label.商店刷新按钮坐标与大小描述: Set the click coordinates for the shop reroll button
SettingForm.Label.高亮提示框坐标与大小描述: Set the parameters for the highlight effect box
SettingForm.Label.游戏进程窗口描述: Select the game process window for screenshots
SettingForm.Label.CPU描述: Use CPU for OCR text detection and recognition, moderate speed
SettingForm.Label.GPU描述2: Use GPU for OCR text detection and recognition, faster speed
SettingForm.Label.OCR结果纠正列表描述: Used to convert known incorrect OCR results to the expected correct results
SettingForm.Label.排除字母描述: OCR results will filter out English letters
SettingForm.Label.排除数字描述: OCR results will filter out Arabic numerals
SettingForm.Label.严格匹配模式描述: When disabled, a match is found if the OCR result contains the target string
SettingForm.Label.启用英雄选择面板描述: A shaped window for selecting champions
SettingForm.Label.英雄头像框边长描述: Sets the size of each champion icon in the selection panel
SettingForm.Label.英雄头像框水平间隔描述: Horizontal spacing between adjacent champion icons
SettingForm.Label.英雄头像框垂直间隔描述: Vertical spacing between adjacent champion icons
SettingForm.Label.启用阵容面板描述: A window for viewing and selecting the current comp
SettingForm.Label.启用状态面板描述: Quickly view feature status, hotkeys, and toggle features
SettingForm.Label.启用输出面板描述: View logs and recognition errors in real time
SettingForm.Label.程序启动时更新推荐装备描述1: Hovering over a champion icon in the main window will show recommended items for that champion
SettingForm.Label.程序启动时更新推荐装备描述3: hours to auto update recommended items
SettingForm.Label.更新推荐阵容描述: Fetch the latest recommended comp data from meta analytics websites
SettingForm.Label.保存截图描述: Save each recognition screenshot to the Logs/Images directory

SetupWizard.Page1.配置向导描述: This wizard will help you quickly complete the initial configuration.
SetupWizard.Page1.配置向导页描述: Configuration includes: OCR screenshot/click/highlight/reroll coordinates, buy/reroll method, OCR inference device, etc.
SetupWizard.Page1.点击下一步继续: You can modify these settings at any time in "Settings". Click "Next" to continue.
SetupWizard.Page2.自动坐标模式描述:
Automatically calculate and set all necessary coordinates by selecting the game process window.
Suitable for League of Legends and TFT Mobile on MuMu emulator. Recommended for first-time users.
SetupWizard.Page2.手动坐标模式描述:
Set coordinates by manually selecting screen regions.
For scenarios where auto coordinates don't work, or advanced users who need precise control.
SetupWizard.Page3.自动设置坐标提示: Note: Auto coordinates only works with PC League of Legends (any resolution) and TFT Mobile on MuMu emulator (specific resolutions).
SetupWizard.Page3.选择游戏进程:
Click the button below to select your game process window.
The program will automatically calculate and set all necessary coordinates.
SetupWizard.Page4.手动设置坐标提示: Click the buttons below and follow the prompts to select the corresponding areas
SetupWizard.Page4.弈子坐标设置提示词1: Please select the hero name area (excluding gold icon) of the 1st card from the left in the shop
SetupWizard.Page4.弈子坐标设置提示词2: Please select the hero name area (excluding gold icon) of the 2nd card from the left in the shop
SetupWizard.Page4.弈子坐标设置提示词3: Please select the hero name area (excluding gold icon) of the 3rd card from the left in the shop
SetupWizard.Page4.弈子坐标设置提示词4: Please select the hero name area (excluding gold icon) of the 4th card from the left in the shop
SetupWizard.Page4.弈子坐标设置提示词5: Please select the hero name area (excluding gold icon) of the 5th card from the left in the shop
SetupWizard.Page4.商店刷新按钮坐标设置提示词: Please select the shop reroll button
SetupWizard.Page4.高亮提示框坐标设置提示词1: Please select all parts of the 1st card from the left in the shop (including hero image and name)
SetupWizard.Page4.高亮提示框坐标设置提示词2: Please select all parts of the 2nd card from the left in the shop (including hero image and name)
SetupWizard.Page4.高亮提示框坐标设置提示词3: Please select all parts of the 3rd card from the left in the shop (including hero image and name)
SetupWizard.Page4.高亮提示框坐标设置提示词4: Please select all parts of the 4th card from the left in the shop (including hero image and name)
SetupWizard.Page4.高亮提示框坐标设置提示词5: Please select all parts of the 5th card from the left in the shop (including hero image and name)
SetupWizard.Page5.购买英雄按键描述:
Choose between simulated mouse or keyboard to buy champions.
PC TFT only supports mouse buying.
TFT Mobile on emulator supports both mouse and keyboard.
SetupWizard.Page6.选择刷新商店方式描述: Choose between simulated mouse or keyboard to reroll the shop
SetupWizard.Page7.OCR设备描述: Select the computing device for OCR character recognition
SetupWizard.Page7.CPU说明: Use CPU for OCR recognition. Moderate speed with good compatibility. Recommended for most users.
SetupWizard.Page7.GPU说明: Use GPU for OCR recognition. Very fast but requires NVIDIA GPU. For advanced users.
SetupWizard.Page8.GPU环境配置页描述: One-click setup for CUDA, cuDNN and runtime to enable GPU acceleration
SetupWizard.Page8.Msg.请先检测GPU: Please detect GPU environment and select a CUDA version first
SetupWizard.Page8.Msg.驱动兼容性警告:
Warning: Your GPU driver supports up to CUDA {0},
but you selected {1}.

This may cause CUDA to not work properly!

Suggestions:
1. Update your GPU driver to the latest version first
2. Or select a CUDA version supported by your driver

Do you still want to continue?
SetupWizard.Page8.Msg.确认安装: The following operations will be performed:
SetupWizard.Page8.Log.请在设置中开启GPU推理: Please enable GPU inference in Settings.
SetupWizard.Page8.Log.nvcc提示: Tip: To use nvcc in command line, please reopen the command prompt.
SetupWizard.Page8.Msg.GPU配置完成:
GPU environment setup complete!

Please enable GPU inference in Settings.

Tip: Environment variables have been configured. To use CUDA commands like nvcc,
please close and reopen the command prompt (or log out and log back in).
SetupWizard.Page9.完成说明: Congratulations! All configuration is done. Click "Finish" to start using JinChanChanTool.

Configuration complete!

The application will restart automatically to apply the settings.
